calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Continued To Jul-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Miyauchi for (petitioner) Takako Nakamura.

The Court stated that it would require a translation of the will by a neutral certified translator and that evidence from witnesses to the will would be needed. Mr. Miyauchi stated that he can have the will translated by a certified translator, will obtain a declaration from the witness and does not anticipate any objections. The petition for spousal property was continued to July 7, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
